text.title: workflows Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for workflows as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Claude Code eagerly batches tool calls in parallel even when sequential execution is instructed.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Enforce sequential by chaining Task calls in a single orchestrator turn and awaiting each. Parallel batching violates the rate-limit protection and cross-contamination prevention that sequential execution provides.

failure-mode.description: AskUserQuestion is ignored in headless or cron contexts, stalling the workflow.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Idea Discovery and Naming workflows assume an interactive user. Automated pipelines (n8n, cron) require a non-interactive mode that picks pre-configured defaults without user prompts.
